title: Orc Magic destroys one magic card on the field

card.rawText: Destroy 1 magic card on the field.

effect.value: Destroy 1 magic card on the field.

plan.title: Orc Magic destroys one magic card on the field
plan.summary: Play Orc Magic, choose a magic card already on the field, and verify the chosen magic is destroyed.

notes: Player_2 has Ball and Chain equipped/in a magic slot as Orc Magic's target.

steps: Select player_2 Ball and Chain as the magic card to destroy.

expectedAssertions.label: Orc Magic goes to cemetery after resolution

manualVerification: Confirm the target prompt lets the player choose exactly one magic card on the field.
riskNotes: Uses the DESTROY_MAGIC action spelling rather than DESTROY_MAGIC_CARDS.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
